lastCommit.subject: fix(hooks): harden drain-pending-board-files concurrent-write race (W.099 fractal). Implemented C (append-then-truncate with sidecar): producers always append (safe), drain uses .last-drained sidecar to process only suffix, atomic trim via .tmp+rename when >TRIM_THRESHOLD. Race window narrowed to trim rename (rare append loss during trim is acceptable; sidecar prevents re-drain). Matches task recommendation. Per task_1778978403816_26k8 and the 3-producer collision during divergence.
